title: Diversity
content:
# Diversity

At the beginning of the 2021-2022 curling season, the Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion committee launched at Triangle Curling Club. The DEI Committee will be working towards creating an inclusive environment at the club and increasing representation to reflect the Triangle community. Triangle Curling is a part of USA Curling's [Ice Breakers](https://www.usacurling.org/ice-breakers) pilot program.

Learn how you can be better champions and allies in our journey to make curling more diverse, inclusive, and equitable at the [DEI Academy](https://academy.globalcurlingdei.org/).

#### Triangle Curling Club Diversity Statement

![DEI TCC Logo](/images/DEI_Bull.jpg) Curling is built upon a foundation of community and the spirit of curling. At Triangle Curling Club, we commit to providing an inclusive and accessible community for all curlers, regardless of ability, age, gender identity, race/ethnicity, religion, veteran status, or sexuality. As the Triangle’s only dedicated curling facility, we commit to advancing the sport of curling by creating opportunities and removing obstacles to curl for everyone, particularly for those who have historically had less involvement in curling and other winter sports. Though curling is rich in tradition, the Triangle Curling Club commits to being a curling club that is always looking to the future and finding new ways to create opportunities to learn, grow, and create a diverse and inclusive community and sport.

#### Resources

[USA Curling Ice Breakers](https://www.usacurling.org/ice-breakers)

[Curling Canada Diversity and Inclusion](https://www.curling.ca/diversity-inclusivity/)

[DEI Academy](https://academy.globalcurlingdei.org/)
